bridge.description: Bridge view with orange pole on right side

flow_axis.description: Unit vector pointing in the LS->SA direction of travel. Motion vectors projected onto this axis: positive sign = LS_to_SA, negative = SA_to_LS.

entry_zones.name: top_LS_end
entry_zones.description: Top of frame near Maseru border — vehicles entering here came FROM the LS canopy heading TO SA.

entry_zones.name: bottom_SA_end
entry_zones.description: Bottom of frame off the bridge — vehicles entering here came FROM SA heading TO LS.

SA_to_LS.description: Lane next to orange pole (right side of image) - vehicles coming FROM South Africa

LS_to_SA.description: Lane away from orange pole (left side of image) - vehicles going TO South Africa

canopy.description: Canopy/Processing area view - shows vehicles queuing and processing

flow_axis.description: LS->SA direction at canopy: from bottom-left (LS road entry) toward upper-right (bridge exit).

entry_zones.name: from_LS_road
entry_zones.description: Bottom/left edge — vehicles entering from LS roads heading to bridge.

entry_zones.name: from_bridge
entry_zones.description: Right edge — vehicles just came off the bridge from SA.

SA_to_LS.description: Left side under green roof - SA vehicles queuing to enter Lesotho (1-2 rows when busy)

LS_to_SA.description: Right side and center area - LS vehicles heading toward bridge/South Africa

canopy.notes: Trucks in canopy area process elsewhere - they don't cause delays for cars. LS_to_SA covers center-right where most outbound vehicles queue.

engen.description: Engen/Wide view - shows approach road from Lesotho side

flow_axis.description: LS->SA approach direction: from far-end of queue (upper-left, deep in Maseru) toward the border (lower-right).

entry_zones.name: queue_tail
entry_zones.description: Far end of queue — vehicles joining the queue from Maseru.

LS_to_SA.description: Main road queue area - cars heading to SA (narrow strip following road)

engen.notes: Engen is used as queue INDICATOR, not for counting. If vehicles detected here = queue stretches past Engen = SEVERE. Excludes truck parking areas.
